introSection: Tumbleweed is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Ghost Town Village. It is currently standing but not operating as the park and ride's future is unknown.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and supports, used to be unpainted.

fullText:
Tumbleweed is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Ghost Town Village. It is currently standing but not operating as the park and ride's future is unknown.



Yellow track and supports, used to be unpainted.
